case_title: OTTO ORLANDO UMANZOR VS. PEDRO PEREZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UMANZOR, OTTO ORLANDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, PEDRO $9,230.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,230.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UMANZOR, OTTO ORLANDO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,981.78 FILED BY UMANZOR, OTTO ORLANDO AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, PEDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARGO SEELY. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARITZA AYERDI. BOTH INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. BOTH INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED AUG-27-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, PEDRO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, PEDRO
